title: SEC DG Meet Edo State Deputy Governor
description: SEC DG Meet Edo State Deputy Governor L-R,  Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Lamido Yuguda with Edo State Deputy Governor Comrade Phillip Shuabu during a Meeting between The SEC
html:
SEC DG Meet Edo State Deputy Governor

L-R,  Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Lamido Yuguda with Edo State Deputy Governor Comrade Phillip Shuabu during a Meeting between The SEC and Edo State Deputy Governor in Benin City yesterday
